description: Spotify is a digital music streaming platform that allows users to discover, play, and organize millions of songs, podcasts, and audio content. Users can create personalized playlists, follow artists, discover new music through recommendations, and access content both online and offline with premium subscriptions.

expected_capabilities.name: Stream Music
expected_capabilities.description: Play songs, albums, and playlists instantly from a vast music library

expected_capabilities.name: Create Playlists
expected_capabilities.description: Build and organize custom collections of songs for different moods or occasions

expected_capabilities.name: Discover Music
expected_capabilities.description: Find new songs and artists through personalized recommendations and curated playlists

expected_capabilities.name: Download for Offline
expected_capabilities.description: Save music locally to listen without internet connection (premium feature)

expected_capabilities.name: Follow Artists
expected_capabilities.description: Stay updated with favorite artists' new releases and activities

expected_capabilities.name: Listen to Podcasts
expected_capabilities.description: Stream and discover podcast episodes and shows

expected_capabilities.name: Share Music
expected_capabilities.description: Send songs, playlists, or albums to friends and social media

expected_capabilities.name: Search Content
expected_capabilities.description: Find specific songs, artists, albums, or podcasts using search functionality

expected_entities.name: Song
expected_entities.description: Individual music tracks that can be played, added to playlists, or shared

expected_entities.name: Artist
expected_entities.description: Musicians or bands who create and perform songs

expected_entities.name: Album
expected_entities.description: Collections of songs released together by an artist

expected_entities.name: Playlist
expected_entities.description: User-created or curated collections of songs organized by theme, mood, or preference

expected_entities.name: Podcast
expected_entities.description: Audio shows or episodes covering various topics and genres

expected_entities.name: Genre
expected_entities.description: Musical categories that help classify and discover similar types of music

expected_entities.name: User Profile
expected_entities.description: Personal account containing listening history, preferences, and social connections
